channel.title: Jules on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Jules on Arrans github.io

item.title: google-labs-code/jules-action
item.description: Add a powerful cloud coding agent to your GitHub workflows

item.title: gemini-cli-extensions/jules
item.description: A Gemini CLI extension that allows you to use the Gemini CLI to orchestrate the Jules asynchronous agent to perform coding tasks like bug fixing, refactoring, and dependency updates.

item.title: arran4/kjules
item.description: A C++ application built with KDE Frameworks that provides a desktop interface for interacting with the Google Jules API
